title: AOI360 Eye Tracking System: Offline Dynamic AOI Generation and Runtime Gaze Mapping for 360 Video in Virtual Reality
description: Research software for dynamic area-of-interest (AOI) analysis in 360 video, covering offline AOI authoring, Unity/OpenXR runtime execution, and post hoc analytics over fixation-level exports. The repository includes the detector benchmark, frozen pilot corpus support, runtime CSV export, and Phase 3 analytics outputs used in the associated feasibility study.
notes: Before publishing the archival release, update the Zenodo record with the final release version, licence decision, and any public data-access statement that applies to the participant pilot outputs.
